name: Heiwa Paper Co.,Ltd.
summary: Heiwa Paper Co.,Ltd. engages in paper trading activities in Japan and internationally. It imports, develops, sells, and exports specialty papers, high-grade papers, industrial papers, and other paper materials. The company also provides fancy papers, fine boards, printing papers, and basic papers; and engages in the development and commercialization of paper products. Heiwa Paper Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
